raw_consumer_statement: on XX/XX/XXXX I contacted Home Depot after receiving my statement. Telling that there were charges on my card that I did not make the charges happened from XXXX. there were 12 purchases between this time that I did not purchase or give anyone permission to purchase. I contacted the company for a dispute and received a letter back saying that they denied my dispute no information why. So I asked them to provide the back up of the merchandise that was purchased so that I can see who purchased the merchandise. I am still waiting for that information and Ive called them several times at this point Ive been charged back with interest and all of the sales. Which I do not plan to pay for in the end I called Home Depot back and told them that I was XXXX XXXX XXXX and that I didnt care about my credit and I wasnt going to pay them. So they reopen the case but here we are in the end of XXXX and I still havent not heard anything.
